# Test Fixture — RULE-02 Section References exemption

## First Section

This claim cites source one [1](https://example.com/one). Another claim from source one [1](https://example.com/one). Claim using source two [2](https://example.com/two). Claim repeating source two [2](https://example.com/two). Claim repeating source two yet again [2](https://example.com/two). Claim citing source two one more time [2](https://example.com/two).
